Now the four funnel system is how we take the 5W avatar and create our system in our ad account that is the layers of bringing people into your world. So you know one thing we'll explore here is how to set up your audiences down your funnel so people that have never heard of you, never clicked on your ads, people that have engaged but not clicked, for example they viewed a video, people clicked but not purchased and also what you do with people that have purchased and we'll be covering all those parts of the funnel in this part of the training and I'll also show you what the budgets look like, like some of the data points that we look at, what percentage of spend, top of funnel, middle, bottom etc and kind of how that looks like in an ad account once we've created our audiences and we have that data built up so like when you start advertising on Facebook and you don't have any data then 100% of your data is test budget but as you develop that and mature it that test budget dies down and then you have a budget in place for prospecting, for converting down your funnel and then for retargeting as well and I'll break that down into why the four funnel system is so important, show you some examples and then give you a worksheet to create your own funnel system as well.
